title: Remove 'Why Choose Ayurvedic Health Remedies?' section from Health Remedies page

requirements.summary: Remove the 'Why Choose Ayurvedic Health Remedies?' section from HealthRemediesPage.tsx while preserving the hero section and five subcategory cards
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Why Choose Ayurvedic Health Remedies?' section is completely removed from HealthRemediesPage.tsx
The hero section with heading and description remains visible
All five subcategory cards remain functional and clickable
The page layout remains visually balanced after section removal
No console errors or broken styling after the removal

file_operations.description: Remove the 'Why Choose Ayurvedic Health Remedies?' section from the component while preserving the hero section at the top and the five subcategory cards (Immunity Boosting, Digestion & Gut Health, Weight Management, Diabetes & BP Support, Stress & Sleep Solutions). Ensure the remaining layout maintains proper spacing and visual balance. Verify that all navigation links to the subcategory pages remain functional after the removal.
